message:
Running command: # DRT-0302 is FATAL. It says "Unsupported multiple pins on bterm VDDIO"
# This is because the step 32 ODB has VDDIO bterm with multiple pins.
# The FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS was True during the original run (pnr_run_v4 started before our fix).
# 
# DIAGNOSIS: Check step 22 (ApplyDEFTemplate) which is where VDDIO pins were added
python3 -c "
import json
with open('/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/22-odb-applydeftemplate/config.json') as f:
    d = json.load(f)
print('FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS:', d.get('FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS'))
" 2>/dev/null
